1_duplicate_code_patterns.summary: Massive duplication of aiohttp.ClientSession() creation. 43 occurrences in kis_api.py alone, 5 in mcp_tools.py. Each function creates and destroys its own session instead of sharing one.

raw_kis_api_calls_bypassing_kis_get.details: 11 locations in kis_api.py use KIS_BASE_URL directly instead of _kis_get(). Includes 4 old-style functions (get_stock_price, get_investor_trend, get_volume_rank, get_kis_index at lines 834-884) and 3 ranking functions (kis_fluctuation_rank:1139, kis_foreign_institution_total:1692, kis_volume_power_rank:1881) that inline the full URL + headers.

1_duplicate_code_patterns.recommendation: Create a shared aiohttp.ClientSession at module/app level (or pass one down). Refactor all KIS calls to use _kis_get(). This would eliminate ~40 redundant session creations and reduce ~200 lines of boilerplate.

2_large_functions.summary: 52 functions exceed 50 lines. The worst offender is _execute_tool at 2201 lines (a single if/elif chain with 23+ branches). Several kis_api.py functions exceed 100 lines.

critical.name: _execute_tool
critical.note: Single monolithic function handling all 29 MCP tools via if/elif. Should be refactored to a dispatch dict.

critical.name: daily_kr_summary
critical.note: Korean market daily summary. Multiple API calls + formatting in one function.

2_large_functions.recommendation: Refactor _execute_tool into a dispatch dict mapping tool names to handler functions. Break daily_kr_summary and check_stoploss into smaller sub-functions.

3_error_handling_consistency.summary: Inconsistent error return patterns across the codebase. Functions return a mix of [], {}, None, and {"error": ...} on failure. No standard Result type or error protocol.

return_patterns_mcp_tools.note: mcp_tools.py is more consistent, using {"error": ...} for tool-level errors

3_error_handling_consistency.bare_except_in_main: 6 bare except: clauses in main.py (catches SystemExit, KeyboardInterrupt too)
3_error_handling_consistency.recommendation: Standardize on a return protocol: list functions return [], dict functions return {"error": msg}. Replace bare except: with except Exception:. Consider a custom Result wrapper for critical paths.

4_unused_imports.summary: 3 files have unused imports detected via AST analysis.

findings.note: Imported from kis_api but not used in mcp_tools.py code
_fetch_sector_flow imported but never called; timezone imported but datetime.timezone used instead

4_unused_imports.recommendation: Remove unused imports. Note: star imports (from kis_api import *) make static analysis difficult -- consider explicit imports.

5_memory_and_performance.summary: Session creation overhead is the biggest issue. No connection pooling. Large JSON files loaded synchronously from disk on every access.

aiohttp_session_overhead.issue: 52 separate aiohttp.ClientSession() creations across the codebase. Each creates a new TCP connection pool.
aiohttp_session_overhead.impact: High -- unnecessary SSL handshakes and connection setup on every API call
aiohttp_session_overhead.fix: Create one session per request batch or use a module-level session with proper cleanup

json_loading.issue: load_json() does synchronous file I/O (open + json.load) in async functions. Files like portfolio_history.json and consensus_cache.json can grow large.
json_loading.impact: Medium -- blocks the event loop during file reads

5_memory_and_performance.no_on2_loops_found: No obvious O(n^2) loops detected. Most iterations are over bounded lists (top-N results).

caching.token_cache: KIS token cached in memory (_token_cache) -- good
caching.consensus_cache: Cached to disk, refreshed weekly -- good
caching.missing_cache: Individual stock prices fetched repeatedly in check_stoploss (every 10 min) without short-term caching

5_memory_and_performance.recommendation: Share aiohttp sessions. Consider aiofiles for JSON I/O in hot paths. Add short-term (5min) price cache for stoploss checks.

6_api_rate_limit.summary: Rate limiting relies entirely on asyncio.sleep() delays. No retry logic on 429 responses. No exponential backoff.
6_api_rate_limit.retry_logic: None found. No retry on 429 or 5xx responses anywhere in the codebase.
6_api_rate_limit.rate_limit_detection: No check for HTTP 429 status codes. Only one reference to 'rate limit' exists (in batch_fetch docstring).
6_api_rate_limit.recommendation: Add retry with exponential backoff to _kis_get(). Check for 429 status and retry after Retry-After header delay. Standardize sleep values (currently 7 different values used).

7_data_file_cleanup.summary: KRX DB has 30-day retention via _cleanup_old_db(). Other log/history files have NO size limits and will grow indefinitely.

unbounded_files.note: One entry per trading day. ~250 entries/year. Will grow slowly but indefinitely.

7_data_file_cleanup.recommendation: Add retention limits: decision_log (keep last 365 entries), dart_seen (keep last 1000 IDs), portfolio_history (keep last 2 years). Add periodic pruning in auto_backup schedule.

8_module_split_proposal.summary: kis_api.py at 4408 lines is far too large. It contains 8 distinct domains that should be separate modules.

current_sections.name: KIS Extended API (Program, Short, News, VI, Rankings)

proposed_split.content: load_json, save_json, all load_* functions, file I/O
KIS token, _kis_get, _kis_headers, all kis_* domestic functions
Fluctuation rank, volume rank, foreigner trend, volume power, finance ratio rank
Volume profile, OHLCV, momentum, supply history, daily closes
FnGuide consensus, US consensus, cache update
DART disclosures, corp map, quarterly OP, reports
Macro data collection, formatting, regime judgment
US/KR signals, turbulence, regime, sector rotation
Google News, Yahoo Finance news, sentiment, earnings calendar

8_module_split_proposal.recommendation: Start with extracting dart_api.py, macro.py, and signals.py as they have the clearest boundaries. Use a shared __init__.py to re-export for backward compatibility.

9_type_hints.summary: 57% of functions have type hints (182/240). kis_api.py has the worst ratio at 69% (102/148). Most missing hints are on load_* utility functions.
9_type_hints.recommendation: Add type hints to all load_* functions (straightforward return types). Add py.typed marker and consider running mypy in CI.

10_logging.summary: Zero logging module usage. All diagnostic output uses print(). 178 print() calls across main project files.
print_patterns: Bracketed prefix: print(f"[function_name] message") -- most common pattern
Error output: print(f"[func] error: {e}") -- used instead of logging.error
Status output: print(f"[func] complete: N items") -- used instead of logging.info
10_logging.recommendation: Replace all print() with Python logging module. Use structured logging with levels (DEBUG for API calls, INFO for operations, WARNING for fallbacks, ERROR for failures). This enables log rotation, filtering, and external log aggregation.

no_retry_logic.detail: No retry/backoff mechanism anywhere. A single network hiccup or KIS API 429 will cause silent data loss in scheduled alerts.

star_imports.detail: Both main.py and mcp_tools.py use 'from kis_api import *'. This pollutes namespace and makes dependency tracking impossible.

monolithic_execute_tool.detail: _execute_tool() is 2201 lines -- the largest function in the codebase. A single if/elif chain with 23+ branches. Each branch is essentially an independent handler function inlined into the chain.
monolithic_execute_tool.recommendation: Refactor to dispatch dict: TOOL_HANDLERS = {'scan_market': _handle_scan_market, ...}. Each handler becomes a separate async function. This alone would make mcp_tools.py reviewable.

bare_except_clauses.detail: 6 bare 'except:' clauses in main.py catch SystemExit and KeyboardInterrupt, preventing clean shutdown.
bare_except_clauses.recommendation: Replace all bare except: with except Exception:

no_connection_pooling.detail: 52 separate aiohttp.ClientSession() instantiations. Each creates a fresh TCP connection pool with SSL context. In daily_kr_summary alone, ~15 sessions are created sequentially.
no_connection_pooling.recommendation: Create one session per scheduled task execution and pass it through function calls.

high: Zero use of logging module (178 print calls)
medium: 46 functions without type hints in kis_api.py
Star imports in main.py and mcp_tools.py
